mnemonics.title: PAGING
mnemonics.content: Pages Allow Graceful Isolation, Never Guessing - Remember paging components: Page table, Address translation, Granularity, Isolation, Nested tables, Guard pages

acronyms.usage: Hardware cache for virtual address translations

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a library catalog (page table) directing you to book locations (physical frames)

analogies.analogy: Like a hotel manager (OS) who moves guests (pages) between rooms (RAM) and storage (disk) as needed
